response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack web/software engineer but has no demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, deep-learning workload optimization, GPU architecture, or hardware-software co-design. The role is a Principal Performance Architect requiring deep hardware and AI accelerator expertise, which is absent from the resume. Background is almost entirely in web, mobile, and backend services with TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software engineering experience across multiple domains
Some low-latency, high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testability
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware architecture experience
No AI accelerator, GPU, or deep-learning workload optimization background
No SIMD/MIMD architecture or hardware-software co-design experience

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
